promptTemplate: A luminous generative artwork visualizing a {{attractor_type}} strange attractor with {{trail_count}} trails of {{trail_length}} length. Colors mapped by {{color_mode}} using a {{color_palette}} palette. Lines drawn at {{line_weight}} weight in {{render_style}} style. Background fades at {{background_fade}} rate. The view rotates at {{rotation}} speed with {{perturbation}} perturbation.
